# unch v0.3.2

`v0.3.2` is a quality and observability release. It keeps the `v0.3.x` install and index model stable while making default search behavior smarter and benchmark output much easier to trust.

## Highlights

- makes `auto` search mode more semantic-first for natural-language queries such as `qwen install`
- adds a relaxed semantic pass before lexical fallback so the default distance cutoff is less brittle
- expands the default benchmark suite to `v3` with additional pinned repositories across Go, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Python
- adds richer benchmark telemetry: suite coverage, per-repository stats, per-query timing, top hits, and observed rank
- improves GitHub benchmark summaries with clearer ranking misses and slowest-query reporting
- adds `golangci-lint` to CI and keeps the main branch linted continuously
- refreshes the README terminal demo with an animated capture

## Upgrade notes

- no index rebuild is required when upgrading from `v0.3.1`
- no installer changes are required for existing macOS, Linux, or Windows x86_64 setups
- benchmark JSON consumers should expect the richer report schema introduced in this release
